response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely matching the role's stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalability, and developer tooling aligns well with the responsibilities, and his open-source contributions and leadership in workshops highlight technical depth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent development and developer tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited exposure to Nest.js (primary backend framework for the role)
Some projects use non-standard languages (e.g., DLang) instead of Kotlin/Java
Geographic location (Nigeria) may require remote work considerations
